add-imported.error: An error occurred while importing some specifications
add-imported.title: Import specification(s)
add-imported.warning: Insert URLs to specifications you want to import.

changed: Changed on {{val, datetime(dateStyle: short; timeStyle: short)}}

delete-resource.title: Remove
delete-resource.warning: You are about to remove {{type}} with name {{name}}. This action is irreversible.
delete-resource.warning-no-name: You are about to remove {{type}}. This action is irreversible.

base-iri.instruction: Enter base IRI for individual concepts
base-iri.name: Base IRI

description.instruction: Describe your project in more detail
description.name: Description

name.instruction: Enter the name of the project
name.name: Name

url.instruction: URL of DSV specifications, each URL on a separate line
url.name: URL

git-url.name: Git URL
git-url.instruction: Insert URL pointing to the specific Git repository (or even specific commit/branch)

reload-imported.title: Reload imported specification
reload-imported.warning: You are about to reload the specification {{name}} from the following URL. If the reload is successful, the specification will be completely overwritten.
reload-imported.warning-no-name: You are about to reload the specification from the following URL. If the reload is successful, the specification will be completely overwritten.

title.merge-commit: Create merge commit to remote Git repository
title.link-to-existing-repository: Link package to remote Git repository

description.create-new-repository-and-commit: On confirm new remote Git repository will be created and the current package will be linked to it
description.commit: Insert the commit message for Git
description.commit-tag-error: You cannot commit into a package representing a tag. Turn it into a branch first.
description.merge-commit: Insert the commit message for Git merge
description.link-to-existing-repository: Insert URL of an existing remote Git repository you want to link to this package. URL may point to commit/branch/tag.

merge-commit-message.append: The given message will be appended after the default merge message automatically created bz Git (current option)
merge-commit-message.exact: The merge message will look exactly as given (current option)

tooltip.repository-owner: Name under which the repository should be created. If empty, bot name is used.

merge-state.on-conflict: Create merge state only on conflict (current option)

toast.link-success: Successfully updated link to remote Git repository
toast.link-failed: Failed updating link to remote Git repository

error.merge-already-merged: The merge from branch was already merged. We cannot merge again.

publication-branch.title: Publication branch name
publication-branch.tooltip: The publication Git branch, which will contain the generated documentation in the Git repository.
